programmes.show_description: First class silliness from the bespectacled duo. Sketches include Pet Talk, Enormous Feet, Love Me, Love My Dog and musical finale Teeny Todd.
Featuring the Chas and Dave sketch. A seasonal treat from 1981 as Ronnie Barker and Ronnie Corbett present a special Christmas show of sketches, spoof news and musical parody.
Featuring the Boring Man sketch. More bifocal laughs with Messrs Barker and Corbett, whose classic skits include Name Game, Invisible Man and the continuing saga of Band of Slaves.
More wonderful wit from the much-loved, much-missed duo. Featuring The Chars, Idiots Again, and the continuing saga of Band of Slaves.

Shopping from Home.
The team are called to a major fire in a chemicals factory and paramedics join firefighters desperately searching for teenagers reported missing in a swollen river.
The team are called in to save the survivors of a fatal crash and there's a bomb alert after Afghan asylum seekers are moved into a seaside hotel.
A police pursuit ends in a crash when a car driven by teenage joyriders plunges into a deep ditch. A punter falls through the floor of his local betting shop in a bizarre accident.

A Faraway Country About Which We Know Nothing: Sir Hallam becomes preoccupied with Nazi Germany, while Lady Agnes's concerns about her family lead to a revelation.
The Love That Pays the Price: Lady Agnes catches the eye of an American millionaire. Lady Persie gets trapped in Germany amid the Nazis' persecution of the Jews. Mrs Thackeray makes a decision.
A Perfect Specimen of Womanhood: Controversy rocks the house when Blanche is reunited with a former lover - the beautiful Lady Portia Alresford. Persie reveals a shocking secret to Hallam.

Sunderland Point: Archaeologist Ben Robinson examines the history of Lancashire village Sunderland Point, which was once a busy port and instrumental in the slave trade.
Shopping from Home.
Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. Paramedic Rochers fights to save a DIY mechanic crushed by his own car.
More real-life drama with Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. The medics are called to support a bomb squad, and help a teenager impaled on a gate.
Reality series following the work of Yorkshire Ambulance Service's Hazardous Area Response Team. There is a suspected acid attack on the streets of Bradford.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: The Doctor and the Thals attempt a perilous mission to destroy the Dalek army, battling Spiridon's lethal environment and Dalek patrols.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: The group struggles to escape as the Daleks turn Spiridon's natural freezing properties into a trap to wipe out their enemies.

programmes.show_name: Doctor Who: Planet of the Daleks
programmes.show_description: The Doctor and the Thals mount a final effort to stop the Daleks' plans on Spiridon before they can threaten the galaxy.
The Doctor and UNIT investigate mysterious deaths linked to a Welsh coal mine where miners have been exposed to a glowing green substance.
As the Doctor explores the mine's depths, Jo befriends an ecologist while UNIT uncovers hints of a dangerous industrial cover-up.
The Doctor discovers giant mutant maggots spawned by chemical waste, while Global Chemicals' director stonewalls UNIT's inquiries.
